# Constant

`generator.constant` · Generators

A flat field at a chosen [0, 1] greyscale value: a fixed level to blend against, offset or scale with, threshold, or use as a uniform control field.

## Purpose

A flat field at one chosen value. Reach for it as a fixed level to blend against, a uniform control field, or a base to offset from.

## Inputs

This node takes no inputs.

## Outputs

- `out`

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Range | Default | Unit | Description | Field-driven |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Value (`value`) | float | [0, 1] | 0.5 |  |  | no |

## Layer contract

Reads and writes the height layer.
